message.plural: {VAR_PLURAL, plural, one {<x id="INTERPOLATION"/> item} other {<x id="INTERPOLATION"/> items}}
message.gender: {VAR_SELECT, select, male {Mr <x id="INTERPOLATION"/>} female {Mrs <x id="INTERPOLATION"/>} other {Client <x id="INTERPOLATION"/>}}
message.number-format: Formatted number: <x id="INTERPOLATION" equiv-text="{{ amount | number : ".2" }}"/>
message.date-format: Formatted date: <x id="INTERPOLATION" equiv-text="{{ currentDate | date : "fullDate" }}"/>
